params.name: An Actor Prepares
params.description:
On May 4, 1938 AD, An Actor Prepares was officially published.
This theoretical work on drama was compiled by Soviet playwright Stanislavski. In the book, the author uses a novel-like form to depict the process of practice and communication among a fictional group of acting teachers and students, thereby explaining the role of an actor's experience in performance art, as well as methods for learning and practice. The work emphasizes the importance of combining an actor's natural emotions and …
